positive: A minimalist, elegant stylized jungle scene. Features deep emerald green monstera leaves, delicate trailing philodendron vines, and abstract watercolor painted exotic flowers in soft teal and gold accents. The composition should be a high-contrast, symmetrical wreath or circular arrangement, emphasizing clean, strong silhouettes against a creamy off-white background. Use a graphic novel aesthetic mixed with botanical illustration. Style should be modern, sophisticated, and highly detailed, suitable for repeat apparel printing. Include subtle gold foil texture accents and deep jade green leaf patterns. Central composition, maximal negative space for printing.
